---
title: "The Social Elasticity of Cities"
subtitle: "How Urban Form Shapes Capacity for Change<br><br>ELASTI-CITY"
author: "Martin Fleischmann"
institute: "Charles University"
format:
    revealjs:
        theme: [default, ../assets/reveal.scss]
        logo: ../assets/icon.svg
        menu: false
        transition: fade
        navigation-mode: linear
        controls-layout: edges
        progress: true
        include-in-header:
            - ../assets/font.html
            - text: |
                <style>
                #title-slide .title {
                    font-size: 50px;
                }
                </style>
        title-slide-attributes:
            data-background-image: ../assets/full_logo.svg
            data-background-size: 20%
            data-background-position: 50% 90%
        max-scale: 10
---

## Which city is the most sustainable {.question}

[The one that adapts.]{.fragment}

---

::: {.r-fit-text .absolute top=30%}
Cities can absorb social change<br>
[without changing their structure.]{.fragment}
:::

---

::: {.r-fit-text .absolute top=30%}
no empirical theory of why<br>some physical forms enable this and others do not
:::

---

::: {.r-fit-text .absolute top=30%}
it is treated as a socio-economic problem
:::

---

::: {.r-fit-text .absolute top=30%}
environment defines the boundaries
:::

---

::: {.r-fit-text .absolute top=30%}
in cities, that environment is urban form
:::



# ELASTI-CITY will shift this paradigm

---

::: {.r-fit-text .absolute top=30%}
environment as the modulating condition
:::


## Social Elasticity of Urban Form

[Inherent capacity to accommodate diverse socio-economic groups]{.fragment} [simultaneously or sequentially]{.fragment}[, without altering its fundamental morphological structure.]{.fragment}

---

::: {.r-fit-text .absolute top=30%}
elasticity is neutral
:::

---

::: {.r-fit-text .absolute top=30%}
its management determines the outcome
:::

---

::: {.r-fit-text .absolute top=30%}
it can facilitate equitable integration<br>[or accelerate displacement]{.fragment}
:::

# Why me{.question}

---

::: {.r-fit-text .absolute top=30%}
urban morphology
:::

---

::: {.r-fit-text .absolute top=5%}
foundational tools
:::
::: {.r-fit-text .absolute top=30% .fragment}
scalable methods
:::
::: {.r-fit-text .absolute top=50% .fragment}
open data
:::

---

::: {.r-fit-text .absolute top=30%}
spatial modelling
:::

---

::: {.r-fit-text .absolute top=30%}
geodemographics
:::

---

::: {.r-fit-text .absolute top=30%}
open science
:::

## Which city is the most sustainable {.question}

[The one that is socially elastic.]{.fragment}
